entry.title: Today is when the Amazon brain drain finally sent AWS down the spout
entry.quote: When your best engineers log off for good, don’t be surprised when the cloud forgets how DNS works

entry.title: Beyond the Machine Creative agency in the AI landscape
entry.quote: I am so tired of hearing about AI. Unfortunately, this is a talk about AI.

entry.title: Where’s the AI design renaissance?
entry.quote: This post attempts to answer two questions: Will AI take design jobs? If so, which ones? In light of that, what should designers focus on?

entry.title: Armed police swarm student after AI mistakes bag of Doritos for a weapon
entry.quote: Allen was handcuffed at gunpoint. Police later showed him the AI-captured image that triggered the alert. The crumpled Doritos bag in his pocket had been mistaken for a gun.

entry.title: Foreign hackers breached a US nuclear weapons plant via SharePoint flaws
entry.quote: A foreign threat actor infiltrated the Kansas City National Security Campus (KCNSC), a key manufacturing site within the National Nuclear Security Administration (NNSA), exploiting unpatched Microsoft SharePoint vulnerabilities, according to a source involved in an August incident response at the facility.
